title: mentha × verticillata var. pilosa
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. pilosa, commonly known as American wild bergamot, is a plant species belonging to the mint family and native to North America. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata var. pilosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and aid in the management of menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
